basics.name: Chenyu Lu
basics.summary: HKUST undergraduate pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Mathematics with a 3.863 GPA. Focused on blockchain cryptography, GUI agent algorithm research, and discrete mathematics. UROP research assistant, undergraduate teaching assistant, and award-winning mathematics competitor with open-source project contributions.

education.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
education.area: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Mathematics
notes: 2026 – 2027 Student Member, The Hong Kong Institution of Engineers (HKIE)
July 2026 Exchange Student, HKUST Summer Study Abroad, Tallinn University

publications.name: Preprint: [Title Corresponding to arXiv:2509.15221v2]
publications.summary: Contributed to large-scale data collection and preprocessing for GUI agent algorithm research; co-authored this academic preprint as part of the HKUST GUI Agent Project supervised by Prof. Qifeng Chen and Dr. Zhaoyang LIU.

teaching.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
teaching.description: Provided academic guidance for undergraduate students on core discrete mathematics concepts; assisted the course instructor with assignment arrangement and grading support.

teaching.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
teaching.description: Guided undergraduate students on HKUST graduation requirement compliance; assisted instructional assistants (IA) with seminar registration checks and academic administrative support.

portfolio.name: OpenGVLab/ScaleCUA
portfolio.description: Contributed to the ScaleCUA open-source project as part of the HKUST GUI Agent Project; supported large-scale data preprocessing and algorithm research for GUI agent development.

portfolio.name: Zeto Project (Blockchain & Cryptography)
portfolio.description: Conducted comparative analysis of UTXO and Account models for blockchain protocol research; applied fundamental cryptography theories to Zeto protocol validation and research documentation.

awards.title: Dean’s List (Full-Time)
awards.awarder: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)

awards.title: Talent Development Scholarship
awards.awarder: HKSAR Government Scholarship Fund, Hong Kong SAR

awards.title: First Prize
awards.awarder: National High School Mathematics Olympiad (Preliminary), Chinese Mathematical Society

awards.title: Merit Award
awards.awarder: 2nd Pi Day Challenge, Qiuzhen College, Tsinghua University

awards.title: Top 99% National Ranking
awards.awarder: Mathematics (Yau Shing-tung Math Test), THUSSAT TACA Exam, China

research.title: UROP Research Assistant, Zeto Project
research.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
research.description: Conducted comparative analysis of UTXO and Account models for blockchain protocol research; studied fundamental cryptography theories and applied them to Zeto protocol validation. Assisted with research documentation, large-scale data sorting, and daily project coordination for the research team.

research.title: UROP Research Assistant, GUI Agent Project
research.institution: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST)
research.description: Performed large-scale data collection and preprocessing for GUI agent algorithm research; co-authored an academic preprint (arXiv:2509.15221v2). Contributed to the OpenGVLab/ScaleCUA open-source research project and assisted with algorithm validation and research report writing.
